rules.rule: All local ESM imports in TypeScript/JavaScript must include the `.js` extension in relative specifiers (for example `./foo.js`).
Use pnpm for install/run/exec commands in docs, scripts, and workflow examples unless an explicit exception is documented.
Behavior-affecting changes must preserve and document required checks: pnpm lint, pnpm typecheck, pnpm test, pnpm audit, and pnpm check.
Agent-authored work must use a branch and PR workflow; do not approve paths that imply direct merges to main without required review artifacts.
